headline: Can ISRG's 'Quintuple Aim' Strategy Continue to Justify Premium Pricing?
summary: Intuitive Surgical's Quintuple Aim strategy is driving premium pricing as da Vinci 5 adoption grows, with innovation-led revenue growth outpacing procedure growth.

raw.headline: Can ISRG's 'Quintuple Aim' Strategy Continue to Justify Premium Pricing?
raw.summary: Intuitive Surgical's Quintuple Aim strategy is driving premium pricing as da Vinci 5 adoption grows, with innovation-led revenue growth outpacing procedure growth.

headline: Edwards Lifesciences Can Sustain Strong Revenue Growth on Technological Leadership, RBC Says
summary: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) can sustain a high revenue growth rate given its technological leadership

raw.headline: Edwards Lifesciences Can Sustain Strong Revenue Growth on Technological Leadership, RBC Says

headline: Edwards wins FDA clearance for LAA clip, setting up competition with AtriCure and Medtronic
summary: Edwards Lifesciences is expected to introduce the new device to surgical heart valve customers this year in a “measured, targeted rollout,” one analyst said.
